subject: My AAA Close Framework
body:
Most business owners hit a revenue ceiling they can't break through.

And after closing a lot of sales myself and now overseeing many many salespeople across our portfolio, I can tell you why:

Your sales ceiling IS your revenue ceiling.

Specifically, most deals are lost in the critical 3-second window after a prospect raises an objection.

Average companies ANSWER objections.

Scaling companies REFRAME them using the "3 A's Framework":

- ACKNOWLEDGE what the prospect said
- ASSOCIATE the objection with successful customer behavior
- ASK a question that maintains control

This framework is the cornerstone of how we train our portfolio's sales teams, and we want to help you implement it too.

Reframe. Close. Scale.

- Alex
